description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring the iconic 'JOUST' branding on its marquee. The cabinet is primarily constructed from wood with a dark red and black color scheme, accented by vibrant artwork. The side panels display a large, colorful illustration of a knight riding an ostrich, wielding a lance, set against a deep red background. The front features a control panel with visible button and joystick placements, a coin slot area, and a large, slightly recessed display screen with a decorative bezel. The marquee at the top is brightly colored with stylized flames and the game's title, while the lower front panel is plain black.
description: A classic upright 'JOUST' arcade game cabinet with vibrant side artwork of a knight on an ostrich, a colorful marquee, and a control panel with buttons and joystick.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the marquee, screen, control panel, and detailed side artwork of the knight on an ostrich.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full side panel artwork and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back panel of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Right-rear view focusing on the side artwork and the cabinet's overall boxy shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a thick black bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several colored buttons arranged in a row, with game-specific artwork and markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'JOUST' title in bold yellow letters with stylized flames and fantasy artwork, vibrant and eye-catching
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful illustration of a knight in red armor riding a yellow ostrich, with a lance and a circular emblem, set against a deep red background
